titleStmt.title: SII 39.249: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 249. (A.R. No. 249 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, PAṬṬUKKAṬṬĀRI KONĒRIDĒVA MAHĀRĀJA, KILAKA (1488 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of all taxes on nañjey and puñjey lands in the village of Kiḻai-neḍuvāyil, by a certain individual named Kōnērināyakar Nāgaiya Nāyakkar, a servant of the king Kōnēri dēvamahārāya to Tānattārs of the temple Tirunārāyanīśvaramuḍaiyā-nāyaṉār. The donor got his nāyakkattanam territory from the king. Taxes like Kudiraikkānikkai, Koṭṭaikkānikkai, Nāṭṭukkāṇikkai, beside other taxes imposed on the communities like Iḍaidurai, Cheṭṭiyār, Kaikkōlar, Kaṇmālar, Paṟaiyar are mentioned in it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kilakavaruṣam Āṭi mātam 10 2 tiyati śrīmanmahāmaṇḍalicuran paṭṭukkaṭṭāri vacavacaṅkaraṉ matiyāta maṉṉar maṇavāḷaṉ kāñcipuravarāticuran koneriteva makāirācāviṉ Ūḻiyam koṉeri nāyakkar
nākaiya nāyakkar tirumuṭṭam Uṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil tānattāṟku kuṭutta tanma cātaṉap paṭṭaiyam Eṅkaḷukku Āṇṭavar nāyakkat taṉamākap pālittu tiruvuḷḷam paṟṟi Aruḷina
patin Oru paṟṟu cirmaiyil viḷantaipaṟṟu kiḻaiṉeṭuvāyi tirumuṭṭam Uṭaiyavar Aḻakiya tirunārāyaṇi curam Uṭaiya nāyaṉāyaṉāṟku tevatāṉam Āka Āṇṭavar tirumenikki
ṉanṟāka veṇum Eṉṟum cūriyakkaṉāṇap puṇṇiya kālattil tārai vāṟkaiyil Iṉta Ūr nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa ṉañcai puñcai ṉilattukku nāḷatuvaraiyum patin
tatāṉa māniyamaṉiñ kallāka ṉinṟa ṉilattukku koḷḷum pakuti viṉivokam kāṇikkai nallerutu koṇikai virimuṭṭu vilaikāriyapper coṭikāṇikkar coṭi ca
mmātam Irāyatavattaṉai Avataravattiṉai kaṭaikkūṭṭuvattiṉai Olai Eḻuttu vattiṉai kaṭṭiyavattiṉai kutiraikkāṇikkai koṭṭaikāṇikkai nāṭṭukkāṇikkai ṉāṭṭu viṉivo
kam Āṉmākaṉai cīvitam Aracucammātam coṭivakaicammātam Āyammakamai paṟṟaṭai calattaram Iṭaittuṟai ceṭṭiyār kaikkoḷar peril koḷum mutal kaṇmāḷa kuṭimakkaḷ
neyyum paṟaiyar peril koḷḷum mutal veṭṭivari koṭṭippaṇam kallāyam karuvippaṇam cekkāyam tirikaip paṇam māvāṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai cāraṭai carukaṭai kāṭu kāval paṉṟi vilai
miṉvilai naṟpacu nallerutu nallerumai naṟkiṭā nallāṭu mātak kaṭṭaḷai Āṭu Eṇṇai ney koḻimuṭṭai nilavaḻakku koḷḷup payaṟu nel mutalukku Uṟai nāḻi Iṉaṅkāl vāci
Eṭutta Aḷavu viruttuppaṭi kiṟaiyavilai kiṟaiya vilaittuṇṭu Āḷaamañci Ūḻiyam Aricikāṇam Uluppai Āṟu veṭṭu kuḷam veṭṭu pulvari Iṉavari maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa Upātiyum
tāḻavi naṭatti cantirātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum Intataṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇinavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyile kavilaiyai koṉṟa pāvattile
poka kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Inta ṉiṟattilek kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Iṉta ṉiṟayattile Iṉta Ūrci māṉiyam Āka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi
k koḷḷavum Ivai ṉākaiyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
